title: Recovery Loop
description: Detecting failed or stalled runs, attempting recovery steps, and re-queuing or aborting
entry_points: scripts/recover_loop.js → main() — outer crash-recovery wrapper (invoked by OS/supervisor on evolver crash)
index.js → main('--loop') — inner daemon loop with inline fault-recovery
outer_recovery_flow: RESOLVE: resolveEvolverEntry(workspaceRoot) — tries skills/evolver/index.js, then skills/capability-evolver/index.js
inner_daemon_loop_flow: STALE PID → log 'Taking over', overwrite lock, continue
REGISTER: signal handlers (SIGINT, SIGTERM → releaseLock + stopEventStream + exit)
REGISTER: unhandledRejection counter; if count >= 5 → releaseLock + exit(1)
SET ENV: EVOLVE_LOOP=true; EVOLVE_BRIDGE defaults to 'false'
PARSE CONFIG: minSleepMs (2000), maxSleepMs (300000), idleThresholdMs (500), pendingSleepMs (120000), maxCyclesPerProcess (100), maxRssMb (500)
START INFRA: a2aProtocol.startHeartbeat() + startEventStream() [or mailboxTransport if A2A_TRANSPORT=mailbox]
START ATP: merchantAgent.start() if atpMode=auto|on and hubUrl set
TRY (outer catch → log loopErr + sleepMs(max(minSleepMs, 10000)) + continue)
last_run.run_id exists AND (no last_solidify OR run_ids differ)
YES → await sleepMs(max(pendingSleepMs, minSleepMs)); continue  [STALL: wait for human/external solidify]
IF EVOLVE_BRIDGE='false': re-read solidifyState; if isPendingSolidify → rejectPendingRun(statePath)
rejectPendingRun: readJsonSafe → set last_solidify.rejected=true, reason='loop_bridge_disabled_autoreject_no_rollback' → atomic write via tmp+rename
CATCH evolve error → console.error + ok stays false
YES (idle/failed) → currentSleepMs = min(maxSleepMs, max(minSleepMs, currentSleepMs * 2))  [exponential backoff]
IF should_explore: tryExplore([], schedule, repoRoot) [idle exploration]
DECISION: cycleCount >= maxCyclesPerProcess(100) OR memMb > maxRssMb(500)?
YES → spawn detached child (node index.js --loop) writing to log file → child.unref() → releaseLock() → exit(0)  [SELF-RESTART]
SPAWN ERROR → log + continue current process
key_functions: sleepMs(ms) [recover_loop.js] — synchronous sleep via spawnSync('sleep'), used in outer recovery wrapper
sleepMs(ms) [index.js] — async Promise sleep via setTimeout, used in daemon loop
readJsonSafe(p) [index.js] — safe JSON file read: existsSync → readFileSync → JSON.parse; returns null on any error
isPendingSolidify(state) — returns true if last_run.run_id exists and does not match last_solidify.run_id
rejectPendingRun(statePath) — reads state, writes last_solidify.rejected=true via atomic tmp+rename
acquireLock() — creates evolver.pid with flag:wx; handles EEXIST by checking if PID is alive
releaseLock() — unlinks evolver.pid if current PID matches
resolveEvolverEntry(root) — scans two candidate paths for evolver index.js
evolve.run() — the evolution cycle (external module src/evolve.js)
state_file: evolution_solidify_state.json — tracks last_run (run_id, signals, active_task_id, etc.) and last_solidify (run_id, rejected, timestamp)
error_recovery_decisions: evolve.run() throws → catch, log error, ok=false → exponential sleep backoff
isPendingSolidify → sleep pendingSleepMs, skip cycle (wait for external solidify)
bridge disabled + pending run → auto-reject (state-only, no git rollback)
unhandledRejection × 5 → releaseLock + exit(1) → outer recover_loop.js restarts
uncaughtException → releaseLock + exit(1) → outer recover_loop.js restarts
cycles >= 100 OR RSS > 500MB → detached self-respawn + exit(0)  [memory/cycle limit]
loopErr (outer while catch) → log + sleep max(minSleepMs, 10000) + continue
env_vars: EVOLVER_RECOVER_WAIT_MS — wait before restart in outer wrapper (default: 10000)
EVOLVER_IDLE_THRESHOLD_MS — cycle duration below which backoff triggers (default: 500)
EVOLVE_PENDING_SLEEP_MS / EVOLVE_MIN_INTERVAL — sleep when pending solidify (default: 120000)
EVOLVER_SUICIDE — set to 'false' to disable self-restart (default: enabled)
EVOLVE_BRIDGE — if 'false', auto-reject pending runs without git rollback
key_relationships: recover_loop.js wraps index.js --loop (outer supervisor → inner daemon)
important_notes: Two-layer recovery: outer (recover_loop.js) handles process crashes by sleeping then re-spawning via spawnSync; inner (index.js daemon) handles cycle failures via adaptive exponential backoff, pending-solidify gating, auto-reject on disabled bridge, and periodic self-restart (suicide) for memory/cycle limits. The state file (evolution_solidify_state.json) is the coordination point between evolution run results and solidify decisions.
